title: Secret Blocks (Fabric)
description: Like the Secret Rooms Mod but for Fabric!
body: Finally, a mod similar to Secret Rooms Mod has come to Fabric! Please be patient as I am working on this in my spare time. This will most likely be ported to future versions after all of the features have been completed. 1.18.2 has reached end of life and will not longer be supported with new features. Please use 1.19.2 versions for the latest features. This mod works like the original secret rooms mod, you can place the block and it automatically picks up the texture of the block you snapped it to! *Works with mod blocks and is Sodium/Iris/Shader friendly.* **This mod must be installed on both Server and Client.** **Current Features Include:** - Ghost Block - Dummy Block - One-Way Glass - Secret Stairs - Secret Slab - Secret Door - Secret Trapdoor - Secret Button - Secret Stone Button - Secret Lever - Secret Redstone - Secret Chest - Camouflage Paste **WIP Features Include:** - Secret Iron Door (Work like regular doors right now) - Secret Iron Trapdoor (Work like regular trapdoors right now) - Switch Probe (Works but on relog changes revert) - Rotator Probe (Works but on relog changes revert) - Secret Goggles (Do Nothing Right Now) **Upcoming Features:** - Secret Hopper - Secret Dispenser - Secret Observer - Secret Trapped Chest - Secret Daylight Detector - Secret Observer - Secret Pressure Plate - Secret Player Pressure Plate - Secret Ladder - Torch Lever
